photos.alt: Head and shoulders of the model looking off camera against blurred trees, wearing a long diamond drop earring and the matching fringe necklace.
Close frame of the model's neck and hand: a diamond fringe necklace, two rings and a matching bracelet above a strapless white gown.
The model presses her hands together beside her face, wearing a diamond drop earring, fringe necklace, two rings and two bracelets above a strapless gown.
The model stands under a tree, hands crossed at the waist of a strapless white gown, wearing a diamond fringe necklace, earrings, bracelets and rings.
Under a cedar, veil hung from the trunk, she holds a coupe glass in a strapless white gown, wearing a diamond drop necklace and bracelet.
Laughing, the model reaches for a basket of pine cones on a lace table, wearing a diamond drop necklace, bracelets and rings on both hands.
Black and white frame: the model holds a bouquet of dried flowers, her diamond drop necklace, bracelets and rings clear against the pale gown.
Beneath a cedar branch, she holds a large eucalyptus bouquet in a corseted white gown, wearing a diamond drop necklace, bracelets and several rings.
The model rests a ringed hand on the laid table in a strapless white gown, wearing a diamond drop necklace and slim bracelets on both wrists.
Seated beside a laid table in a full white gown, veil caught on a cedar branch, she wears a diamond drop necklace, bracelet and rings.
In a veil, head lowered over the bouquet in her lap, she wears a V-shaped diamond necklace, drop earrings, bracelets and a cluster ring.
The model sits on a wooden chair in the grass, veil trailing, lowering a bouquet and wearing a V-shaped diamond necklace, bracelets and rings.
In a strapless tulle gown and veil, the model stands beside a lilac bicycle with a flower-filled basket beneath cedars, wearing a diamond necklace and rings.
